# Ice Fish

> Official guides, demo, download, and blog for Ice Fish (crash-style game). English URLs use the `/en/` prefix; other languages use the same slugs under `/{lang}/`.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://ice-fish.run/en/)
- [Demo (play in browser)](https://ice-fish.run/en/demo/)
- [Demo app (fullscreen)](https://ice-fish.run/en/demo/app/)
- [Download / Android APK guide](https://ice-fish.run/en/download/)
- [Predictor](https://ice-fish.run/en/predictor/)

## Content

- [Blog](https://ice-fish.run/en/blog/)
- [Guides](https://ice-fish.run/en/guides/)
- [Games](https://ice-fish.run/en/games/)

## Machine-readable

- [Sitemap](https://ice-fish.run/api/sitemap/index_hub.xml)
- [robots.txt](https://ice-fish.run/robots.txt)
